title: Open the Zone Configuration Page From the Overall System Aveva API Page
summary: Access the Zone configuration page from the Overall System Aveva API page. The source confirms that the Overall System Aveva API page contains a Zone configuration option that pops up the zone configuration page, but also notes that nobody uses it. This runbook covers page access only and does not authorize configuration changes.
when_to_use: Use when support personnel need to access the Zone configuration page from the Overall System Aveva API page and only page access is required.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to make configuration changes, because the source only confirms how to open the page.
Do not use this runbook as evidence that the Zone configuration page is commonly used; the speaker states that nobody uses it.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the Overall System Aveva API page, locate the Zone configuration control, and select it to access the Zone configuration page.

safety_notes: This source segment only supports opening the Zone configuration page.
Do not perform configuration changes based on this source segment because it does not describe safe edit actions.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Overall System Aveva API page

access_required: Access to the Overall System Aveva API page
system_preconditions: The Overall System Aveva API page is available to the user.

visual_references.description: Overall System Aveva API page showing the Zone configuration entry among other page options.

steps.title: Open the Overall System Aveva API page
steps.purpose: Navigate to the page that contains the Zone configuration control.

steps.failure_condition: The Overall System Aveva API page is not accessible or does not display the expected options.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the Overall System Aveva API page cannot be opened.

steps.failure_condition: The Zone configuration control is not visible or cannot be identified.

steps.failure_condition: The zone configuration page does not open after selecting Zone configuration.
